allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps understanding-motivations trace behavior back to organizational design, role structure, and coordinated incentives rather than to personality stories alone.
allies.source_quote: Thinking of an organization as an evolutionary machine designed to achieve a goal requires a focus on motivation.

allies.rationale_text: Pareto-principle helps understanding-motivations focus on the few motive-linked actions that drive most of the observed result.
allies.source_quote: The Pareto Principle ... Motivation clarifies which 20% to focus on

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias distorts understanding-motivations when analysts read the hidden drivers they already expect instead of what the evidence supports.
Constraints checks understanding-motivations when a behavior that looks deeply psychological is actually driven by simpler situational limits.
antagonists.source_quote: Danger when analysts become so committed to hidden-motive interpretation that they over-psychologize simple constraint or capability problems.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Understanding-motivations conflicts with simplification when mapping the full motivational landscape adds complexity beyond what a simple incentive lever would require.
structured_tensions.source_quote: understanding-motivations conflicts with simplification (simplification) when mapping the full motivational landscape adds complexity beyond what a simple incentive lever would require.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Understanding-motivations conflicts with confirmation-bias when motivational analysis selectively surfaces drivers that confirm the analyst's preferred intervention.
structured_tensions.source_quote: understanding-motivations conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when motivational analysis selectively surfaces drivers that confirm the analyst's preferred intervention.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on system-level motive diagnosis, leverage focus, and anti-overpsychologizing checks, but it does not offer a clean explicit current-vocabulary tension block.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor motivation relation sprawl beyond the clearer systems, leverage, and anti-story-fitting surface.
open_questions: The constraints antagonist is source-explicit and cleaner than many of the source's softer social neighbors, which is why it survived the bounded set.
